leadText: The Frigid Sea (Japanese: 凍てつきの海 Freezing Sea) is a location in the Galar region. It connects to Roaring-Sea Caves to the east and Three-Point Pass to the southeast.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Dive Ball Sw Sh TR03 ( Hydro Pump ) Sw Sh Shell Bell Sw Sh Hidden items [ edit | edit source ] Every item that regenerates every day can also rarely regenerate as a Wishing Piece (at approximately a 1% chance).
